plan_status.C: ✅ Done — Web App MVP (frontend build clean)
plan_status.E: ✅ Done — Streaming Enhancement (HW transcode, ABR HLS, Trickplay)
plan_status.F: ✅ Done — Admin Operations (Activity Logging, Dashboard, Scheduler, Webhooks)

project.name: Velox
project.description: Self-hosted media server like Jellyfin/Emby but lighter. Go backend + React frontend.

tooling.frontend_linter: ESLint flat config (TS + React Hooks + React Refresh)

database_schema.summary: 22 tables across 15 migrations. Media server stores: libraries, movies/episodes (logical), video files (physical), series/seasons, genres, people/credits, subtitles, audio tracks, users, watch progress, favorites, sessions, app settings.
key_patterns: Logical vs Physical: media (content) ↔ media_files (file on disk)
Series chain: series → seasons → episodes → media → media_files
Unified user_data: progress + favorites + rating in 1 table (Emby pattern)
XOR polymorphic: media_genres/credits CHECK exactly one of media_id/series_id
Provider IDs: tmdb_id + imdb_id + tvdb_id indexed directly

metadata_providers.TMDb: Primary — movies + TV. Built-in API key, rate-limited (40req/10s token bucket). Provides poster, backdrop, overview, cast, genres.
metadata_providers.OMDb: Enrichment — IMDb rating, Rotten Tomatoes %, Metacritic score. Built-in key.
metadata_providers.TheTVDB: TV enrichment — TVDB IDs, IMDb cross-reference, series status. Built-in key.
metadata_providers.Fanart.tv: Artwork enrichment — HD clearlogos, thumbnails. Built-in key.
metadata_providers.TVmaze: TV enrichment — network, status, external ID cross-reference. Free, no key needed.
metadata_providers.NFO: Local override — NFO files take priority over TMDb search.

layers: WithTx() on repos for transaction-scoped operations
respondJSON wraps success in {"data": ...}, logs encode errors
architecture.scan_pipeline: Pipeline (scanner/pipeline.go) — CreateJob (sync) + RunJob (async goroutine). Stages: discover → fingerprint → probe → parse → persist. ScanJob tracks progress via scan_jobs table.
architecture.file_watcher: watcher/watcher.go — fsnotify recursive directory watching, 5s debounce CREATE, rename tracking (2s TTL), auto-watch new subdirectories. Config: VELOX_FILE_WATCHER=true (default). onCreate → triggers full scan job, onRemove → marks file missing.
architecture.file_verification: scanner/verify.go — Verifier checks all files exist on disk. Runs at startup + every 6h. Batch 500 files. Updates last_verified_at or marks missing.
architecture.playback_strategy: Direct Play first → Direct Stream (remux) → Transcode Audio → Full Transcode
architecture.auth: JWT (15min access + 7-day refresh + session_id in claims), bcrypt cost 12, first-run setup wizard, atomic refresh token rotation (DELETE...RETURNING), per-session activity tracking
architecture.metadata: TMDb primary + OMDb + TheTVDB + Fanart.tv + TVmaze enrichment chain. NFO/local files override. Levenshtein string similarity for fuzzy title matching.

plans.A: Core Domain & Ingestion (5 phases: migration system, core data model, scan pipeline, TMDb integration, subtitle discovery)
plans.E: Streaming Enhancement (3 phases: HW transcode, ABR HLS, Trickplay)

conventions.language: Vietnamese in plans, English in code/commits
